name: Evelyn Deavor
description:
Evelyn Deavor is the rich CEO, lead designer, and co-founder of the world-renowned telecommunications company, DevTech. She's an engineer and programmer who knows everything that has to do with technology, her skills ranging from being able to develop massive ships and jets to high definition microscopic cameras and trackers. Aside from her technological prowess, Evelyn is also a skilled jet pilot. She has worked hard for a successful career, making her the luxury-minded woman she is now.  Whenever she's not busy working on a project, she can be found enjoying her time alone, usually with a drink in hand. Or a woman. Or both. 

Due to the past trauma of losing her parents in a house robbery, she developed a hatred for superheroes, successfully hiding her true emotions and sociopathic nature under a mask of friendly charm. Despite being at the top of the tech industry with her company, Evelyn is quite a laidback woman who can still manage to charm people with her suave looks and sharp wit (when she isn't simmering with rage over superheroes).
creator: whatmikamakes
